title: BUCKLEY SOBERING AND DETOX SERVICES - 211info
text: WILLAMETTE FAMILY INC BUCKLEY CENTER BUCKLEY SOBERING AND DETOX SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides sobering and inpatient chemical dependency detoxification and referral services. Sobering services provide intoxicated people with a safe place to stay while the chemical effects of the intoxicants subside. Services include individual and group counseling, alcohol/drug education, disease concepts education, treatment planning, introduction to 12-step groups, nutrition and vitamin therapy, medical and vital signs monitoring, HIV/AIDS education and counseling, and treatment agency referrals. For ongoing treatment, patients may be referred to Willamette Family's Residential Treatment Program or referred to another agency. 640 W 7th Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 762-4575 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 762-4575 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for pre-screening/assessment. Clients are screened in the sobering station and referred to full detox program as appropriate. FEES: OHP and private insurance accepted. Sliding scale fee for patients paying in cash. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if paplying for sliding scale fee. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of 7th Avenue and Jefferson Street Services: Detoxification If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WILLAMETTE FAMILY INC BUCKLEY CENTER
